untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a specific THRESHOLD parameter that is not defined ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). The threshold distance from SMA cannot be expressed without knowing its numeric value. Additionally, SMA period is marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]. Used sma_50 as a reasonable default, but exact threshold offset cannot be implemented.
translation_notes: Mean-reversion strategy using SMA crossover logic. Entry conditions simplified to price crossing SMA without the undefined threshold offset. Exit conditions use SMA as reversal point. To fully implement, require: (1) numeric threshold value in points/percentage, (2) specific SMA period (attempted sma_50). Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal handles both long and short entries.
